title: Raspberry Pi Image Description Provisioning Map
description: The Provisioning Map (PMAP) defines how a Raspberry Pi image is provisioned on-device. It is an ordered sequence of entries describing partition assignments, slot mappings for A/B layouts, and optional LUKS2 encryption configuration. The PMAP is authored per-image and embedded in the IDP document by rpi-image-gen, or supplied manually for images built outside rpi-image-gen.

oneOf.description: A standalone PMAP document as a bare array of entries.
A PMAP document embedded within an IDP layout object.

provisionmap.description: The provisioning map array embedded in the IDP layout.

partitionRef.description: A reference to a partition image by name, with optional attributes.

image.description: The name of the partition image as defined in the IDP partitionimages map.

comment.description: An optional human-readable comment describing this partition reference.

static.description: Optional static attributes to fix partition properties such as UUID or role at provisioning time.

id.description: A partition identifier string. Not currently used.

uuid.description: A UUID for this partition. For standard partitions, corresponds to the UUID of the matching partition image. For on-device created partitions such as LUKS containers, this UUID is used at partition creation allowing the partition to be identified with this UUID on device.

role.description: The role of this partition on the device, used by the provisioning tool to apply role-specific handling.

expand-to-fit.description: If true, the partition is expanded to fill the remaining available space on the device.

slotMap.description: A map of named slots keyed by slot name (A or B), each containing a set of partitions. Used for A/B partition layouts.

A.description: The A slot, containing a list of partitions and optional encryption configuration.

partitions.description: The list of partition references assigned to this slot.

encrypted.description: Optional encryption configuration for this slot.

B.description: The B slot, containing a list of partitions and optional encryption configuration.

partitions.description: The list of partition references assigned to this slot.

encrypted.description: Optional encryption configuration for this slot.

luks2.description: LUKS v2 parameters used to create this encrypted container.

key_size.description: The encryption key size in bits.

cipher.description: The cipher and mode used for encryption, e.g. aes-xts-plain64.

hash.description: The hash algorithm used for metadata integrity, e.g. sha256.

label.description: An optional human-readable label for the LUKS2 container.

uuid.description: The UUID assigned to the LUKS2 container. Required so that the container can be identified and unlocked at runtime.

mname.description: The device mapper name for the LUKS2 container, used as the mapped device name under /dev/mapper.

etype.description: The encrypted container type. 'raw' for a directly encrypted block device, 'partitioned' for a LUKS2 container that itself holds a partition table.

encryptedNode.description: Defines an encrypted container, combining LUKS2 configuration with a slot map, a flat list of partitions, or both.

luks2.description: The LUKS2 configuration for this encrypted container.

slots.description: A slot map defining named A/B partition sets within this encrypted container.

partitions.description: A flat list of partition references within this encrypted container.

expand-to-fit.description: If true, the encrypted container is expanded to fill the remaining available space on the device.

encryptedNodeFlat.description: Defines an encrypted container within a slot entry, combining LUKS2 configuration with a flat list of partitions. Nested slots are not permitted.

luks2.description: The LUKS2 configuration for this encrypted container.

partitions.description: A flat list of partition references within this encrypted container.

expand-to-fit.description: If true, the encrypted container is expanded to fill the remaining available space on the device.

attributesEntry.description: A PMAP entry that declares top-level attributes for the provisioning map, including format version and system type.

attributes.description: The attributes object containing PMAP version and system type.

PMAPversion.description: The PMAP format version in semver format. Used by provisioning tools to determine how to parse this PMAP.

system_type.description: The partition layout type. 'flat' for a simple single-slot layout, 'slotted' for an A/B layout.

partitionsEntry.description: A PMAP entry that defines a flat list of partition references.

partitions.description: The list of partition references for this entry.

slotsEntry.description: A PMAP entry that defines a map for a slotted partition layout.

slots.description: The slot map for this entry.

encryptedEntry.description: A PMAP entry that defines an encrypted container.

encrypted.description: The encrypted container configuration for this entry.
